underlying_goal: Implement a complete 6-phase Remote Agent Dispatch System across multiple repos following a Trello epic, with full development pipeline including tests, code review, and commits
friction_detail: Multiple issues arose including incorrect table names, linter removing imports prematurely, TypeScript type mismatches, wrong git working directory, and 3 bugs found during review (missing phase data crash, frozen elapsed time, Pusher event leak).
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement all 6 phases of a Remote Agent Dispatch System epic across multiple repos with full CI pipeline, and Claude delivered all phases with commits, tests, bug fixes, and Trello card management.
